title: Early-warning PH predictor of SOC electrode degradation trajectories
source_document: Прорывные Гипотезы  Трансдисциплинарный Анализ Биологии, Материаловедения и Теории Управления.md
why_promising: Strong Python-first path remains, but the candidate is now narrower: early-warning degradation prediction rather than generic PH use in SOCs.
claimed_datasets: solid oxide cell microstructure evolution datasets
minimal_python_route: Compute persistence features from initial or early-stage electrode microstructure data and test whether they predict later degradation metrics or trajectories.
first_falsification_test: Reject if persistence-derived early features fail to improve prediction of later degradation against a simple morphology or microstructural-parameter baseline.
next_verification_step: Verify whether longitudinal early-warning prediction from PH descriptors is still open after the 2023, 2025, and 2026 SOC topology papers.

title: TDA for early detection of resistant-state transitions in cancer single-cell data
source_document: Прорывные Гипотезы  Трансдисциплинарный Анализ Биологии, Материаловедения и Теории Управления.md
why_promising: Still promising if narrowed to early resistant-state transition detection and benchmarked against standard single-cell trajectory baselines.
minimal_python_route: Build TDA features over resistance-labeled single-cell state spaces and test whether they improve early resistant-state detection beyond standard embedding, clustering, pseudotime, or velocity baselines.
first_falsification_test: Reject if TDA features provide no measurable lift over standard single-cell trajectory or clustering baselines for resistance stratification.
next_verification_step: Verify a concrete resistance-labeled benchmark dataset and determine whether TDA adds real value beyond existing single-cell methods.

title: Graph-based benchmarking for MOF synthesizability and stability proxies
source_document: Прорывные Гипотезы  Трансдисциплинарный Анализ Биологии, Материаловедения и Теории Управления.md
why_promising: Still strong because datasets and structure resources are real, but the honest version is now a benchmark question rather than a raw novelty claim.
minimal_python_route: Train a graph model on a defensible MOF synthesizability or stability-proxy task and compare against descriptor-based and sequence-based baselines.
first_falsification_test: Reject if graph models do not outperform simpler baselines or if the target label cannot be defended as a meaningful synthesizability proxy.
next_verification_step: Verify target-label quality and determine whether MOFSimplify or a free-energy threshold benchmark is the best open MVP route.

title: Benchmarking persistent-homology descriptors for metallic-glass transition and deformation proxies
source_document: Прорывные Гипотезы  Трансдисциплинарный Анализ Биологии, Материаловедения и Теории Управления.md
why_promising: Good open-data route remains, but the honest version is now a benchmark problem on transition-adjacent proxies rather than a fresh PH-for-glass novelty claim.
minimal_python_route: Derive persistence signatures from metallic-glass structures and test whether they predict cooling-rate- or deformation-related proxies better than simple structural descriptors.
first_falsification_test: Reject if topological descriptors fail to explain or predict chosen transition-adjacent proxies beyond standard handcrafted features.
next_verification_step: Verify whether a defensible open benchmark target exists beyond generic cooling-rate or mechanical-response proxies.

title: Koopman-style slow-mode analysis for LLPS-relevant IDP trajectory data
source_document: Прорывные Гипотезы  Трансдисциплинарный Анализ Биологии, Материаловедения и Теории Управления.md
why_promising: The conceptual bridge remains interesting, but readiness is limited until a real LLPS-trajectory benchmark is found.
minimal_python_route: Apply Koopman or VAMP-style analysis to genuine LLPS-relevant IDP trajectories and test whether the extracted slow modes improve on simpler kinetic summaries.
first_falsification_test: Reject if no defensible LLPS trajectory benchmark can be assembled or if Koopman-derived slow modes show no advantage over simpler kinetic analyses.
next_verification_step: Find an open LLPS-relevant trajectory dataset; the current seed datasets are not a good fit for this task.

title: Optimal-transport inference of rejuvenation driver genes
source_document: Прорывные Гипотезы  Трансдисциплинарный Анализ Биологии, Материаловедения и Теории Управления.md
why_promising: Fits the project's biology-control-information triangle and has a clean single-cell computational route.
minimal_python_route: Use transport-based trajectory inference to test whether candidate interventions move cell-state distributions toward younger attractors.
first_falsification_test: Reject if transport-derived driver rankings are unstable or do not align with held-out perturbation evidence.
next_verification_step: Verify whether rejuvenation-focused OT workflows already exist and identify a tractable benchmark dataset.

title: Informational aging clocks from chromatin topology
source_document: Прорывные Гипотезы  Трансдисциплинарный Анализ Биологии, Материаловедения и Теории Управления.md
why_promising: Potentially high impact, but depends on hard-to-harmonize omics and topology data.
minimal_python_route: Map topology-derived chromatin features to age-related information loss proxies and test predictive value against simpler clock models.
first_falsification_test: Reject if topological features fail to add signal beyond existing age-clock baselines.
next_verification_step: Verify the availability of paired chromatin-topology and aging datasets with sufficient sample quality.

title: Mean-field theory for morphogenetic patterning in dynamic tissues
source_document: Прорывные Гипотезы  Трансдисциплинарный Анализ Биологии, Материаловедения и Теории Управления.md
why_promising: Conceptually strong but likely less immediate than the pure data-driven candidates.
claimed_datasets: dynamic tissue imaging or morphogen transport datasets
minimal_python_route: Build a reduced dynamic-tissue transport model and test whether mean-field corrections improve fit to observed morphogen behavior.
first_falsification_test: Reject if the reduced model offers no explanatory gain over simpler static-tissue baselines.
next_verification_step: Verify the cited dynamic tissue literature and identify an openly reusable benchmark dataset.

title: TDA of topological targets in LLPS condensates
source_document: Прорывные Гипотезы  Трансдисциплинарный Анализ Биологии, Материаловедения и Теории Управления.md
why_promising: Related to H1 but more target-discovery oriented; promising if suitable structural data can be assembled.
minimal_python_route: Extract topology features from candidate condensate-related molecular structures and test association with target-relevant behavior.
first_falsification_test: Reject if topology features fail to separate biologically relevant condensate classes from controls.
next_verification_step: Verify whether appropriate LLPS-structure datasets exist and whether this idea overlaps too strongly with current literature.

title: Network control of defects in 2D materials
source_document: Прорывные Гипотезы  Трансдисциплинарный Анализ Биологии, Материаловедения и Теории Управления.md
why_promising: Good transdisciplinary transfer candidate, but may be harder to ground in directly available data.
claimed_datasets: grain-boundary defect resources for h-BN and MoS2
minimal_python_route: Represent defect propagation or controllability over a graph abstraction of a 2D material and test whether control metrics explain macroscopic defect outcomes.
first_falsification_test: Reject if network-control metrics show no relation to measured defect evolution or material properties.
next_verification_step: Verify that the graph abstraction is scientifically defensible and that suitable benchmark data exists.
